name: Thomas Blackwell
backstory: Thomas comes from three generations of merchants. His grandfather started with a single mule, trading basic goods between villages. His father expanded the business to regional trade routes. Thomas has taken it further, establishing trade connections across multiple kingdoms and territories. He's survived bandit attacks, market crashes, and political upheavals, always emerging with his reputation for fair dealing intact.
goals: Expand trade routes to the Northern Kingdoms

relationships.daughter: Miranda Blackwell - heir to the business, learning the trade
relationships.rival: Victor Goldwyn - competing merchant who doesn't share Thomas's ethics
relationships.ally: Captain Serena Drake - ship captain who transports his goods

quirks: Tests gold coins by biting them
